name: kl_3_Y_loop_chrY
description: Drosophila Y-chromosome lampbrush loop: kl-3 (DNAH8 dynein). kl-3 male fertility factor — axonemal dynein heavy chain; loop C; ~4 Mb total length on Y including intron heterochromatin, the largest Drosophila gene. Y-loops are transcribed in primary spermatocytes producing megabase-scale primary transcripts of which 99% is intronic satellite that is co-transcribed but never spliced into mRNA. Coordinates here cover the assembled euchromatic flanks; the loop interior itself is heterochromatin-only and largely absent from BDGP6.46.
expected_copy_count: 1 per haplotype (Y carriers only); intronic satellite arrays repeat 10^4-10^5 times
